sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23318" key="daktuliourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δακτῠλιουργός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23318.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ring-maker,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0494.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philyll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:207" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">207</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
